document_spans_line_order.name: document_spans_line_order
document_spans_line_order.value: "document_spans"."line_start" is null or "document_spans"."line_end" is null or "document_spans"."line_end" >= "document_spans"."line_start"

document_spans_char_order.name: document_spans_char_order
document_spans_char_order.value: "document_spans"."char_start" is null or "document_spans"."char_end" is null or "document_spans"."char_end" >= "document_spans"."char_start"

users_clerk_user_id_not_empty.name: users_clerk_user_id_not_empty
users_clerk_user_id_not_empty.value: "users"."clerk_user_id" is null or length("users"."clerk_user_id") between 1 and 200
